vibe: Premium, Old Money Tech, Cambridge-aligned, Localized

scale.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tighter leading-none font-medium

typography.pairing_strategy: Classic Serif Head (Cormorant Garamond) + Clean Sans Body (Manrope) for a premium, authoritative 'Cambridge Press' feel.

marketing.strategy: Tetris Grid, Generous padding. Use p-12 to p-24.

layout_spacing.corners: rounded-sm (max 4px radius, avoiding overly bubbly generic SaaS looks)

buttons.primary: bg-[#C63A2F] text-white hover:bg-[#A52D23] rounded-sm px-6 py-2 transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#E5E5E4] text-[#1A1A1A] hover:bg-[#F2F2F0] rounded-sm px-6 py-2 transition-colors

cards.default: bg-white border border-[#E5E5E4] rounded-sm shadow-sm p-6

worksheet_preview.container: bg-white border border-[#E5E5E4] shadow-lg mx-auto w-full max-w-[800px] min-h-[1000px] p-10 md:p-16
worksheet_preview.styling: Internal styling MUST use the Cormorant Garamond serif font to simulate a real printed test. Use black and white strictly inside the worksheet area.

ad_placeholders.container: bg-[#F9F9F8] border border-dashed border-[#CCCCCC] p-4 flex items-center justify-center relative min-h-[250px]
ad_placeholders.label: absolute top-2 left-2 text-[10px] tracking-widest text-[#999999] uppercase font-bold

bilingual_toggle.styling: Minimalist text toggle 'EN / VI'. Active state bold and black, inactive gray. No bubbly switch backgrounds.

paywall_modal.styling: Glassmorphism backdrop (backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60). Modal content uses solid white background, sharp corners, bold serif typography to emphasize value. Two clear, equal-width options: 'Watch Ad' (secondary styling) vs 'Upgrade Premium' (primary terracotta styling).

free_counter_badge.styling: Stark black/white minimalist badge with a small terracotta notification dot. e.g. '2/3 Free Worksheets'

hero_image.description: Teacher engaging with students. Use in the hero section. Apply max bg-black/30 overlay if text is placed over it.

worksheet_texture.description: Subtle paper texture. Use as a very low opacity (e.g. 5%) background pattern for the worksheet preview panel to give it a physical feel.

history_empty_state.description: Exam paper and pencil. Use for the empty state of the Worksheet History sidebar.

motion: Minimalism. Hover states lift slightly (-translate-y-[1px]). Slide up and fade in for the Paywall Modal. No bouncing or heavy scaling.

icons.style: Duotone weight to match the premium, sophisticated vibe.

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL FONTS: Add Google Fonts links for 'Cormorant Garamond', 'Manrope', and 'JetBrains Mono' to index.html.
INSTALL ICONS: Run 'yarn add @phosphor-icons/react'. Use Phosphor Icons for all UI iconography.
TAILWIND CONFIG: Add the custom font families to tailwind.config.js (font-serif: Cormorant Garamond, font-sans: Manrope, font-mono: JetBrains Mono).
SHADCN OVERRIDES: Override the CSS variables in index.css. Set --radius to '0.25rem' to enforce the sharp/premium look. Set primary color to HSL equivalent of #C63A2F.
LAYOUT - MARKETING: The Landing Page Hero MUST use the Tetris Grid pattern. Do not center everything. Break symmetry.
LAYOUT - DASHBOARD: Use the Control Room Grid pattern. The left sidebar contains the Generator Form and Ad Placeholders. The right main panel (spanning more columns) contains the Worksheet Preview.
UI - WORKSHEET: The generated worksheet must look like a physical Cambridge exam paper. Use borders for header boxes, dotted lines for writing spaces, and strict serif typography.
BILINGUAL: Implement a React Context or simple state to toggle EN/VI text across the UI.
TESTING: Add data-testid attributes to ALL interactive elements (buttons, inputs, language toggle, paywall options, PDF download button). Format: data-testid='kebab-case-role'.
